heading: Action for recovery of erroneous refunds
label: 7405 Action for recovery of erroneous refunds

children.heading: Refunds after limitation period
children.label: a Refunds after limitation period
children.text: Any portion of a tax imposed by this title, refund of which is erroneously made, within the meaning of section 6514, may be recovered by civil action brought in the name of the United States.

children.heading: Refunds otherwise erroneous
children.label: b Refunds otherwise erroneous
children.text: Any portion of a tax imposed by this title which has been erroneously refunded (if such refund would not be considered as erroneous under section 6514) may be recovered by civil action brought in the name of the United States.

children.heading: Interest
children.label: c Interest
children.text: For provision relating to interest on erroneous refunds, see section 6602.

children.heading: Periods of limitation
children.label: d Periods of limitation
children.text: For periods of limitations on actions under this section, see section 6532(b).
